scripts.dev: npm run build:functions && npm run build:frontend && concurrently --names "functions,emulators" --prefix-colors "magenta,yellow" "npm run dev:functions" "FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 firebase emulators:start --import=./emulator-data --export-on-exit=./emulator-data"
scripts.dev:hot: npm run build:functions && concurrently --names "vite,functions,emulators" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:functions" "FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 firebase emulators:start --only auth,firestore,functions --import=./emulator-data --export-on-exit=./emulator-data"
